articles.title: Iran's nuclear project is 'unchanged', says senior ex-Israeli intelligence officer
articles.summary: Iran's nuclear project is 'unchanged', says senior ex-Israeli intelligence officer A former senior Israeli intelligence officer, who served during the current war on Iran, has said that the Iranian nuclear project remains “essentially unchanged” despite Israeli and US attacks.  Tamir Hayman, the executive director of Israel's Institute for National Security Studies, served in a senior position in Israeli military intelligence over the first two months of the US-Israeli war on Iran.  On Sunday, he disclosed details about Israel’s operations during the war in a

articles.title: Israeli attacks across Lebanon kill seven
articles.summary: Israeli attacks across Lebanon kill seven At least seven people have been killed in Israeli attacks across Lebanon since dawn on Monday, the country's health ministry is reporting. articles.title: Iran's foreign ministry: US talks ongoing through Pakistan

He added that Iran discussed the amendments with the US on Sunday via Pakistan. articles.title: Video: US fighter jets crash mid-air during Idaho air show
articles.summary: Video: US fighter jets crash mid-air during Idaho air show Two US fighter jets collided mid-air during a public air show at a US air force base in Idaho in front of spectators. The collision unfolded during a routine display flight, where pilots were forced to eject. The jets fell toward the airfield, exploding on impact as emergency services responded and the air show was immediately halted. All four crew members reportedly survived after ejecting from the jets.
